title: Thymeleaf
subTitle: Dynamic server-side rendering for Spring-based applications
overviewContent: I use Thymeleaf to generate dynamic, server-side rendered web pages that integrate smoothly with back-end Spring logic. I use templates to handle forms, conditional content, and error messages, keeping code maintainable and structured. This improves SEO, page-load performance, and security, and pairing Thymeleaf with Spring Boot lets me render server data seamlessly and reuse it across views, making front-end development faster and more consistent across applications.
